mapper.select: SELECT session_id AS sessionId, project_id AS projectId, pr_number AS prNumber, pr_url AS prUrl, state, diff_summary_json AS diffSummaryJson, review_plan_json AS reviewPlanJson, review_result_json AS reviewResultJson, created_at AS createdAt, completed_at AS completedAt FROM review_session WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_session ( session_id, project_id, pr_number, pr_url, state, diff_summary_json, review_plan_json, review_result_json, created_at, completed_at ) VALUES ( #{row.sessionId}, #{row.projectId}, #{row.prNumber}, #{row.prUrl}, #{row.state}, #{row.diffSummaryJson}, #{row.reviewPlanJson}, #{row.reviewResultJson}, #{row.createdAt}, #{row.completedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE project_id = VALUES(project_id), pr_number = VALUES(pr_number), pr_url = VALUES(pr_url), state = VALUES(state), diff_summary_json = VALUES(diff_summary_json), review_plan_json = VALUES(review_plan_json), review_result_json = VALUES(review_result_json), created_at = VALUES(created_at), completed_at = VALUES(completed_at)
